next_steps: Send serum and CSF for a comprehensive autoimmune and paraneoplastic encephalitis antibody panel
Perform whole-body PET/CT scan to evaluate for occult malignancy
Trial of high-dose intravenous corticosteroids (e.g., methylprednisolone) as both diagnostic and therapeutic intervention
Continued anti-seizure medication management for epileptiform discharges
Brain biopsy if clinical condition fails to stabilize with immunotherapy and workup remains inconclusive
Avoid antiplatelet or anticoagulant therapy due to the risk of worsening lobar microhemorrhages
